title: Peppery Chewy Middle Eastern Nuts Crumble
description: A delicious and show-off middle-eastern dish featuring toasted nuts with a spicy kick, perfect for snacking or as an appetizer.
instructions: Coarsely chop the nuts into small pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together chopped nuts and salt until well combined. Add black pepper and garam masala, then stir in cayenne pepper if using.
If using sugar, add it to the mixture along with 2 tablespoons of water or olive oil. Mix thoroughly until you achieve your desired consistency.
Transfer the mixture onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Flatten the mixture slightly using a spatula or spoon.
Bake in preheated oven for about 10-15 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy on top. Remove from oven and let it cool down before breaking into small pieces for serving.
Serve as a snack with drinks or alongside salads.
